next_steps: Open the web_ui_url from deploy output (default host port 3100) from the LAN.
Sign in or create an account, then choose Claim this instance on the setup screen (authenticated/private first admin).
CLI fallback: paperclipai auth bootstrap-ceo inside the server container if browser claim is unavailable.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/paperclip-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Optional: add BIND A record and nginx-waf sites[] when paperclip.public_url is configured.
Keep HDC_PAPERCLIP_DB_PASSWORD and HDC_PAPERCLIP_BETTER_AUTH_SECRET backed up — losing them makes the Postgres volume and sessions unrecoverable.
